title: chrysophyllum argenteum subsp. auratum
intro: Chrysophyllum argenteum subsp. auratum, also known as the golden cambodge or golden cambodge tree, is a species of tree in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum argenteum subsp. auratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
